description.p: Tunecraft is a high-performance, cross-platform, offline music player built with Rust and Dioxus. It features gapless playback, professional-grade equalizer, smart playlists, and a refined dark UI designed for audio enthusiasts.

Key features include a hybrid three-thread audio pipeline (GStreamer decode, Rust DSP, cpal output), 10-band parametric EQ with coefficient smoothing, mood-based music discovery, crossfade playback, ReplayGain normalization, Last.fm scrobbling, MPRIS2 D-Bus integration, real-time spectrum analyzer, and waveform seek bar.

ul.li: Changed: UI framework migrated from iced v0.14 to Dioxus v0.7
Changed: Architecture changed from Elm-style to component-based (React-like)
Changed: Styling migrated from iced style structs to CSS with light/dark theme
Changed: All UI elements rewired to TuneCraft Core
Removed: iced and tiny-skia dependencies
Fixed: Version format corrected to x.y (was incorrectly x.y.z)
Fixed: README and CHANGELOG trimmed of redundant content
Changed: All version strings synchronized to 4.2
Fixed: OS keyring integration for credential encryption
Fixed: Build system version mismatch synchronized across all files
Added: 9 integration tests for audio pipeline
Changed: UI framework migrated from GTK4 to iced for cross-platform support
Changed: Dependencies updated (rubato replacing samplerate, rand 0.9)

description.p: Version 3.14 — PCM Cache Wiring & Memory Optimization

ul.li: Changed: PcmCache default capacity reduced from 10 to 5 entries, lowering peak memory from ~330 MB to ~165 MB for better compatibility with older hardware
Added: PcmCache wired into the production mood analysis pipeline — decoded PCM data is now cached and reused, eliminating redundant Symphonia decoding
Fixed: Version mismatch across project files (Cargo.toml, meson.build, Info.plist, WiX) — all synchronized to 3.14

description.p: Version 3.6 — Code Quality, Audio Improvement & Scrobble Wiring

ul.li: Fixed: Extracted duplicate cast_u8_to_f32() to shared utility (DRY cleanup)
Fixed: Centralized all gstreamer::init() calls through ensure_gstreamer_initialized()
Fixed: Smooth seek-fade ramp replaces hard mute/unmute for click-free seeking
Fixed: Split monolithic media_bridge.rs into per-platform modules for maintainability
Added: ScrobbleManager with automatic scrobble threshold checking and queue flushing
Changed: Version format now strictly follows x.y (no patch component)

Improved: AudioEngine Mutex fields consolidated from 15 separate locks into 3 grouped sub-structs (EngineVolumeState, EngineReplayGainState, EngineTransportState), reducing lock acquisitions and eliminating ReplayGain config inconsistency (Bug #33 fix)
Improved: All 57 UI-layer .expect() calls replaced with mutex poison recovery, matching the audio engine's consistent pattern
Improved: Shared PCM cache eliminates dual-decode overhead for mood analysis — tracks are no longer decoded twice
Added: Hindi (hi) locale translation for the Indian music audience that the mood classifier serves
Added: Playlist import/export UI — M3U and XSPF files can now be imported and exported via the sidebar (Ctrl+I / Ctrl+Shift+E)
Fixed: MPRIS set_loop_status() and set_shuffle() now emit PropertiesChanged D-Bus signals — external clients (GNOME panel, KDE media widget, media keys) see live state updates (Bug #52)
Fixed: Genre preset reset_built_in() now uses a static lookup table instead of reconstructing all 12 presets

description.p: Version 2.0 — Complete Bug Fix & Optimization Release

ul.li: Fixed: All 87 reported bugs across Critical, High, Medium, and Low severity levels
Fixed: Deadlock between toggle_playback and play_track_internal (ABBA lock ordering)
Fixed: Queue lock held across play_track_internal creating lock chains
Fixed: MPRIS metadata() doing file I/O while holding queue lock
Fixed: Shared DspEngine corrupted by preloaded session's DSP thread
Fixed: Heap allocations in real-time audio path (convolution, cpal callbacks)
Fixed: gstreamer::init() double-init error blocking pipeline creation
Fixed: Migration v5 crashing on fresh databases
Fixed: TPDF dither using XOR instead of ADD for triangular distribution
Fixed: Volume not applied to non-crossfade pipeline
Fixed: Float equality comparison using f64::EPSILON (effectively ==)
Fixed: SQL injection in apply_pragmas via string interpolation
Fixed: Race condition in add_track_to_playlist on position
Fixed: Last.fm partial failure counting as fully successful
Fixed: Cover art and pref DB errors silently swallowed
Fixed: Loudness smoothing coefficient applied per-buffer instead of per-sample
Fixed: O(n) block removal in loudness accumulator (now VecDeque)
Fixed: Mixer sink pads not released when crossfade entries cleared
Fixed: Preloaded gapless session missing bus watch and position timer
Fixed: Thread spawn failure silently ignored in gapless preloader
Fixed: parse_peak assuming 16-bit peak scaling only
Fixed: path_to_uri double-encoding risk
Fixed: XSPF parser not handling numeric character references
Fixed: Duration formatting for durations >= 1 hour
Fixed: reqwest::Client created per request (now reused)
Fixed: MPRIS seek() not clamped to track duration
Fixed: Preferences dialog not updating in-memory config
Fixed: Drag-and-drop bypassing file path validation
Fixed: connect_open handler creating barebones Track with no metadata
Optimized: Removed unnecessary Arc<Mutex> around ring buffer producer
Optimized: Mood count badge uses COUNT(*) instead of loading full Track objects
Optimized: Scrobble queue flush moved off main thread
Improved: All mutex poison recovery now logs warnings
Improved: Consistent tilde expansion across all code paths
Improved: Added click handlers to previously non-functional toolbar buttons
Improved: Lyrics highlight timer properly cleaned up on dialog close
Fixed: Player state callback tried to access non-existent AppState.player_state field — now correctly writes through AppState.playback Mutex to PlaybackInner.player_state.

Fixed: Accumulated playback seconds timer tried to access non-existent AppState.accumulated_playback_secs field — now correctly increments through AppState.playback Mutex to PlaybackInner.scrobble.accumulated_secs.
Fixed: Database access in signal handler used .lock() on RwLock — changed to .read() for proper read lock acquisition.
Fixed: Duplicate test module in smart_playlist.rs prevented compilation — removed the redundant second module.
Fixed: "Recently Played" smart playlist showed empty results because view_resolver.rs didn't map it to the template — now correctly resolves to templates::recently_played().
Fixed: Scrobble flush tried Arc::clone on &AppState instead of Arc<AppState> — now uses self_arc_clone() to retrieve the stored Arc.
Fixed: Unknown EQ preset logged at debug level instead of warn — now uses tracing::warn! for visibility.
Fixed: Shuffle order regeneration after set_tracks() left shuffle_order without a deterministic starting position when current_index was None — now defaults to placing index 0 at the front.

Fixed: GaplessPreloader now shares the engine's DspEngine instead of creating a separate instance with default settings, eliminating the brief window of wrong EQ/ReplayGain/stereo-width at track boundaries during gapless playback.
Fixed: underrun_count() is now properly wired from AudioOutput through Session to AudioEngine — no longer returns a hardcoded 0.

Added: EBU R128 / ITU-R BS.1770 loudness measurement and normalization as a complement to ReplayGain. Tracks without ReplayGain tags now receive real-time loudness normalization to a configurable target LUFS level (default -23 LUFS, adjustable).

Added: Bit-perfect / exclusive mode output path. Bypasses the system mixer entirely (ALSA direct or PipeWire exclusive on Linux) for audiophile-quality output at the hardware's native bit depth and sample rate with no kernel resampling.

Added: Parametric Mid-Side (M/S) EQ processing in the DSP chain. Up to 5 independently configurable M/S EQ bands allow per-band EQ of the Mid (centre) and Side (stereo difference) components — a mastering-grade feature previously found only in professional DAWs and high-end players.

Added support for all audio formats GStreamer can handle via uridecodebin, including AC-3, DTS, Opus, WebM, WavPack, MIDI, tracker modules, and many more container formats (MKV, MP4, AVI, FLV, TS, and others).
Over 50 new file extensions are now recognised by the library scanner.

description.p: Quality improvement release: comprehensive testing, reduced lock contention, stronger credential protection, and internationalization foundation.

ul.li: Added: Comprehensive unit tests for DSP biquad coefficients, EQ gain accuracy, mood classifier boundaries, smart playlist edge cases, scanner symlink safety, and config roundtrip
Improved: Refactored AppState from 16 individual Mutex fields to grouped sub-structs behind fewer locks, with AtomicU64 for volume and RwLock for read-heavy fields
Improved: Added OS keyring integration for credential encryption key derivation, with fallback to dotfile mechanism
Fixed: File watcher now validates canonicalized paths against watch directories to prevent symlink escape
Fixed: Scanner deduplicates files by canonical path to avoid scanning the same file via different symlink paths
Added: i18n framework with gettext-rs integration, preparing for multi-language support
Improved: Added security documentation for MD5 usage in Last.fm signing, clarifying SHA-256 is used for all integrity checks
Improved: Added performance documentation for mood analysis dual-decode issue

description.p: Launch-ready release with comprehensive stability, security, and packaging fixes.

ul.li: Fixed: Audio pipeline panic on malformed GStreamer buffers — now gracefully skips
Fixed: Deadlock when stopping playback during GLib callbacks
Fixed: MPRIS open_uri now returns proper error instead of silently accepting
Fixed: About dialog showed wrong version (0.8.0 instead of current)
Fixed: Flatpak manifest referenced non-existent meson options — now builds correctly
Fixed: Version numbers synchronized across all project files
Added: Configuration validation — dangerous values are clamped to safe ranges
Added: Confirmation dialog before library rescan
Added: AppStream screenshots for Flathub submission
Improved: Ring buffer sizes doubled for better high-latency resilience
Improved: MPRIS state changes now properly notify the UI
Improved: XML entity decoding order fixed in XSPF playlist import
Improved: HTTP client reuse for LRCLIB lyrics requests

description.p: Release candidate with hardened error handling, panic-free audio pipeline, and full mutex poison recovery across the audio engine and crossfade subsystem.

ul.li: Fixed: GStreamer pad lookup panics replaced with graceful error logging
Fixed: Mutex poison recovery on all audio engine lock sites
Fixed: DSP thread spawn failure now logs an error instead of crashing
Fixed: ReplayGain and mood analysis use safe fallbacks on unexpected data
Added: CHANGELOG.md with full version history

description.p: Major feature release: hybrid GStreamer + cpal audio pipeline, 10-band parametric EQ, mood-based discovery, Last.fm scrobbling, MPRIS2 D-Bus, and smart playlists.
Initial release with core playback, library management, and UI.

screenshot.caption: Main window showing the track library with mood badges, sidebar navigation, and the now-playing bar
